# GitHub Agents Configuration

This folder is a placeholder for future GitHub-native agent configurations.

## Purpose

As GitHub continues to develop native AI agent capabilities, this folder will contain:

- Agent-specific workflows
- Custom agent configurations
- Agent permission definitions
- Inter-agent communication protocols

## Current Status

This folder is prepared for future use. GitHub's native agent infrastructure is evolving, and this placeholder ensures the repository structure is ready for adoption.

## Expected Future Contents

```
agents/
├── code-review.yml      # Code review agent config
├── testing.yml          # Testing agent config
├── documentation.yml    # Documentation agent config
└── security.yml         # Security scanning agent config
```

- [GitHub Copilot Documentation](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot)
